cases.prompt: Average quality single family homes in Skagit County, excluding low quality homes.

failures.message: R2SearchError: The query must read from allowed R2 parquet files with read_parquet().

action_plan: The model generated SQL without an approved read_parquet('r2://openskagit/...') source. Regenerate with explicit allowed parquet paths; low-quality dwelling searches should join parcel_search.parquet to improvements.parquet.
Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: The model generated SQL without an approved read_parquet('r2://openskagit/...') source. Regenerate with explicit allowed parquet paths; low-quality dwelling searches should join parcel_search.parquet to improvements.parquet.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value, string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes, 'Average or better quality SFR excluding low quality' AS match_reasons
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') i ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(i.ParcelNumber)
WHERE TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) IN (110, 111, 112, 113)
  AND TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) IN ('MSF', 'MSA', 'MSG', 'MSVG', 'MSE')
  AND TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) <> 'MSL'
GROUP BY ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.assessed_value
cases.title: Average Quality Single Family Homes in Skagit County Excluding Low Quality
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels classified as single family residential (land use codes 110, 111, 112, 113) with improvement quality class MSA (average) or better, excluding low quality (MSL). Countywide Skagit County search with no city or floodplain filters.
